title: Ice Cream in the Northeast
tagline: Community-researched map of ice cream in the northeast

intent.statement: Pilot multi-state enrichment of ice cream destinations with strong location fidelity and photo-backed product evidence.
intent.scope: Northeast U.S. pilot locations within the declared regional bounds.
intent.photoPolicy: Require product-centered photos with verifiable source context where possible.

intentHistory.author: codex
intentHistory.summary: Established pilot-map intent and evidence policy for future expansion waves.
